fieldValues.value: Text Projection must include tags after field segments; display-label segments are optional

The Text Projection MUST include tags array entries as segments after all field segments, with fieldId = "tag" and fieldName = "tag", one segment per tag string in array order. An implementation MAY additionally include FieldAssignment.displayLabel values as segments appended after the tag segments, with fieldId = "label" and fieldName = "label" — this step is optional. Two conforming implementations may differ in whether they include display-label segments; this is explicitly permitted. Display-label segments, if emitted, are not required for recall-floor compliance.

Tags are semantic metadata that users search by. Making them searchable is essential. Display labels are rendering-only metadata; emitting them is a useful heuristic (users may search by label) but loading FieldAssignments requires an additional package access that may not be cached, so it is optional to avoid penalizing lightweight engines.
